meta.title: Kilometer 0 Digital
meta.description: KM0 Digital is a community movement to reclaim digital control. Open, local, and sustainable services, not just another provider.

hero.tagline: A social and technological movement built by and for the community, not just another provider.

vision.intro: Essential technology should not depend on a handful of distant giants. KM0 Digital proposes another way.

usual.title: The usual way
items: Prices that do not reflect real costs
Total dependence on a few global providers

km0.title: The KM0 proposal
items: Control and transparency over your data
An open community anyone can join

community.humanNote: Real people stand behind this project, not a corporation or an anonymous call centre. You talk to the people who build the service.

items.title: Local transformation

mission.heading: Returning digital control to the community
mission.body: People, families, associations, cooperatives, schools, and organisations; KM0 connects open, close, and sustainable services for anyone who wants a real alternative to Big Tech.

items.question: Is KM0 just another tech provider?
items.answerHtml: No. It is a community movement with concrete services. The vision is to return digital control to people and organisations; Cloud and email are the first tangible steps.

items.question: Who can participate?
items.answerHtml: Anyone or any organisation interested in open, close alternatives: families, associations, cooperatives, schools, and more. Write to us or join the WhatsApp group.

items.question: Where is the service hosted?
items.answerHtml: Our infrastructure runs in Falkenstein, Germany, on Hetzner, a European provider we chose for reliability, transparent pricing, and keeping your data within the EU.

items.question: Is the service certified to ISO 27001?
items.answerHtml: Yes. KM0 Digital is operated by AMVARA CONSULTING S.L., certified to ISO/IEC 27001:2022 by TÜV NORD CERT. KM0, cloud.km0digital.com, and mail.km0digital.com are included in the certificate scope as part of AMVARA's platform and associated cloud-native services. See our security page for details. If you need the certificate, statement of applicability, or a security questionnaire, contact us.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answerHtml: Yes, your data is secure. We use EU-based infrastructure (Germany), TLS-encrypted traffic, and we do not sell your data for advertising or model training. We document operations in the technical blog. See our privacy policy and security page for more detail. Like any online service, residual risk remains; for specific regulatory needs, contact us.

items.question: Is the service certified?
items.answerHtml: Yes. KM0 Digital is a community project operated by AMVARA CONSULTING S.L., certified to ISO/IEC 27001:2022 (TÜV NORD CERT). The service does not hold certification under its own name, but it falls within AMVARA's certified scope as part of its platform, cloud, and mail services. See our security page and legal page. We design, deploy, and maintain KM0 under those controls; technical operations are documented in the blog. For specific compliance requirements, get in touch: we can provide relevant documentation.

contact.heading: Be part of the movement
contact.body: Explore, ask, collaborate, or simply listen. We are building this together, from the origin.

pricing.heading: Simple, stable storage at a fair price

heroPrice.ariaLabel: Price: €1.99 per month for 500 GB of storage

pricing.intro: KM0 Digital offers 500 GB for €1.99/month for people who want straightforward, reliable storage at a fair price.
pricing.claim: Up to five times more space than basic plans from other companies at a similar price.
pricing.compareIntro: The table shows indicative market references based on comparable public plans.
pricing.tableDisclaimer: Indicative figures based on public reference plans. Official provider prices may vary by region, taxes, and promotions.

whyPricing.heading: Why is our price different?
whyPricing.body: Our price is possible thanks to optimised infrastructure and a model focused on operational efficiency, not maximising margin per customer. We do not need the same revenue margins: enough to maintain infrastructure sustainably and deliver a reliable service.

why.title: Why does KM0 exist?
why.body: Because your privacy and your files belong to you. We are not a distant megacorporation: we are your tech neighbors.

rows.usual: Your personal data is the product

rows.usual: Abusive pricing with no real cost justification

community.title: Technology made for people
community.subtitle: Built by and for the community
community.body: KM0 Digital is not a closed corporate product. It is a cooperative movement designed for families, schools, individuals, and local businesses. Our mission is to give people back digital control, making technology simple, accessible, and easy to manage.

cloud.title: KM0 Cloud: your easy, secure space
cloud.lead: Just as simple as the tools you already use, but respectful of your life.
features: Full sync: access your photos and files from Android, iOS, or your web browser
Real-time collaboration: edit Word, Excel, and PowerPoint documents without leaving the cloud
Share without limits: share family or work links with 100% security
cloud.imageAlt: KM0 Cloud interface showing files and collaboration

items.title: Close
items.body: No endless phone trees or automated tickets. We are in your region, ready to help person to person.

items.title: Transparent
items.body: Our operations and technologies are open and public. We do not hide trap clauses in fine print.

items.title: Sustainable
items.body: A fair business model. We charge what it costs to run the service cleanly.

privacy.title: A commitment you can measure
privacy.lead: While big tech giants monetize every photo, file, email, and interaction to sell you ads, KM0 Digital forbids commercial use of your data on principle.

security.title: Peace of mind with maximum security

items.title: 100% European infrastructure
items.body: Your files are stored within the European Union, protected by the world's strictest privacy legal framework (GDPR).

items.title: Encryption and professional audit
items.body: Your transfers travel fully protected and encrypted. Internal management follows ISO/IEC standards for bank-grade security.

items.title: Ethical, open software
items.body: We do not rely on opaque licenses or closed code. The platform is open, so you can truly verify how your information is handled.

legal.metaTitle: Legal notice and privacy - Kilometer 0 Digital
legal.metaDescription: Legal notice, GDPR privacy policy, and cookie information for km0digital.com, KM0 Cloud, and KM0 Mail. Operated by AMVARA CONSULTING S.L.
legal.heading: Legal notice and privacy
legal.intro: This page covers the legal notice, privacy policy, and cookie information for the Kilometer 0 Digital marketing website, KM0 Cloud, and KM0 Mail. All legal content for these properties is published here on km0digital.com.

sections.title: Legal notice
sections.bodyHtml:
Website owner and operator

AMVARA CONSULTING S.L.
NIF/CIF: ES-B65707994
Gran Via de les Corts Catalanes 636, Princ. 1B
08007 Barcelona, Spain
Website: https://km0digital.com/
Cloud service: https://cloud.km0digital.com/
Mail service: https://mail.km0digital.com/

The content on this website is provided for general information about Kilometer 0 Digital and related services. It does not constitute legal, financial, technical, or professional advice unless explicitly stated.

AMVARA CONSULTING S.L. strives to keep information accurate and up to date but does not guarantee completeness or suitability for any particular purpose. Use of this website is at your own risk.

Links to third-party sites (including WhatsApp, GitHub, KM0 Cloud, KM0 Mail, and external providers) are provided for convenience. We are not responsible for their content, availability, or privacy practices.

Text, images, software, design, logos, and trademarks on this site are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. Unauthorised reproduction, distribution, or transformation is prohibited without prior written consent from AMVARA CONSULTING S.L.

For legal enquiries: hello.yoel@amvara.de

sections.title: Privacy policy
sections.bodyHtml:
Data controller: AMVARA CONSULTING S.L. (details above).
Privacy contact: hello.yoel@amvara.de

This policy describes how we process personal data on km0digital.com (marketing site), cloud.km0digital.com (KM0 Cloud), and mail.km0digital.com (KM0 Mail). Legal pages for these properties are hosted on km0digital.com.

Marketing site (km0digital.com)

  • Ideas form (/ideas/): message (required), optional name, locale, IP address, and User-Agent. Submissions are posted to a host spool for a few minutes, then automatically destroyed. Your name and message topic are retained in a GitHub Issue on the project repository for triage and follow-up.
  • Contact section: no data is stored on the site. Email links open your mail client (hello.yoel@amvara.de).
  • WhatsApp group link: you leave our site and join a third-party service operated by Meta. Their policies apply: WhatsApp Privacy Policy.
  • Cloud user count (/cloud/): no personal data from visitors. The count is fetched at build time via the OpenCloud Graph API using server-side credentials.
  • Server logs: IP address, User-Agent, timestamps, and request metadata in nginx and host access logs for security and troubleshooting (typically retained up to 30 days, or longer if required for incident investigation).

KM0 Mail (mail.km0digital.com)

  • Account data: email address, password hash, quotas, and aliases for @km0digital.com mailboxes.
  • Mailbox content: messages sent and received, attachments, and metadata (headers, dates).
  • Webmail (Roundcube): session cookies on mail.km0digital.com when you use webmail (not on the km0digital.com marketing site).
  • Operational logs: Postfix, Dovecot, nginx, and Rspamd logs for security, anti-spam, and troubleshooting.

Purposes and legal bases

  • Operating the website and KM0 Cloud services (contract and legitimate interest).
  • Providing KM0 Mail services (contract and legitimate interest).
  • Handling ideas and support requests (legitimate interest and, where applicable, consent).
  • Security, abuse prevention, and legal compliance (legitimate interest and legal obligation).

Retention

  • Ideas spool files: minutes, then destroyed.
  • GitHub Issues from the ideas pipeline: retained while the issue is open and thereafter as project history on GitHub until archived or deleted under GitHub's policies.
  • Server access logs: limited period as described above.
  • KM0 Cloud account and file data: retained for the life of the account and as required for backups and legal obligations; see the KM0 Cloud section below.
  • KM0 Mail mailbox content and account data: retained for the life of the account plus operational backups as described in the km0-mail runbook; deleted when the account is removed unless legal retention applies.

Recipients and subprocessors (verified)

  • GitHub (ideas pipeline issue tracking)
  • Hetzner (EU hosting, Germany)
  • Meta / WhatsApp (optional community link only)
  • Let's Encrypt (TLS certificates)
  • KM0 Mail stack (self-hosted Postfix, Dovecot, Rspamd, and Roundcube; no external SaaS mail provider for the product)
  • OpenCloud stack (KM0 Cloud product infrastructure)

Data is primarily processed within the European Union. Where a provider processes data outside the EU, we rely on appropriate safeguards as required by GDPR.

Your rights

Under GDPR you may request access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection, and data portability where applicable. You may withdraw consent at any time when processing is based on consent. Contact hello.yoel@amvara.de. You may lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD): www.aepd.es.

Security

We apply technical and organisational measures including HTTPS, access controls, and operational practices aligned with AMVARA's ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certified management system. See our security page for more detail.

We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be reflected on this page with an updated date.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.bodyHtml:
Marketing site (km0digital.com): we do not set cookies on marketing pages today. We do not use analytics or advertising trackers on this site. No cookie consent banner is required for the marketing site in its current form.

KM0 Cloud (cloud.km0digital.com): authentication and session cookies may be set on the cloud domain when you sign in or use the service. These cookies are not loaded on km0digital.com. Session cookies support login and secure access to your account and files.

KM0 Mail (mail.km0digital.com): Roundcube session cookies may be set on the mail domain when you use webmail. These cookies are not loaded on km0digital.com. Session cookies support secure access to your mailbox.

If we introduce cookies on the marketing site in the future, we will update this section and implement appropriate consent where required by law.

sections.title: KM0 Cloud
sections.bodyHtml:
KM0 Cloud (cloud.km0digital.com) is a community OpenCloud instance operated by AMVARA CONSULTING S.L. Legal and privacy information for the cloud service is published on this page on km0digital.com.

Data we process

  • Account data: registration details, username, email, and authentication data managed via Dex, LDAP, and related identity components.
  • Files and metadata: content you upload, file names, sharing settings, and activity metadata stored in OpenCloud.
  • Session and auth cookies: set on cloud.km0digital.com to maintain secure sessions (not on the marketing site).
  • Operational logs: access and security logs on EU infrastructure for reliability and incident response.

Hosting and location

Cloud infrastructure runs in the European Union (Germany) on Hetzner. Traffic is encrypted with TLS. Backups and operational details are described in our technical blog where applicable.

Your choices

You can access, correct, or delete your cloud data through the service where supported, or contact hello.yoel@amvara.de for privacy requests related to your KM0 Cloud account.

sections.title: KM0 Mail
sections.bodyHtml:
KM0 Mail (mail.km0digital.com) provides @km0digital.com mailboxes and Roundcube webmail, operated by AMVARA CONSULTING S.L. Legal and privacy information for the mail service is published on this page on km0digital.com.

Data we process

  • Account data: email address, password hash, quotas, and aliases.
  • Mailbox content: messages, attachments, and metadata stored in Maildir.
  • Webmail session cookies: set on mail.km0digital.com to maintain secure sessions (not on the marketing site).
  • Operational logs: access and security logs on EU infrastructure for reliability, anti-spam, and incident response.

Hosting and location

Mail infrastructure runs in the European Union (Germany) on Hetzner. Traffic is encrypted with TLS. We do not use an external SaaS mail provider for the KM0 Mail product.

Your choices

For privacy requests related to your mail account, contact hello.yoel@amvara.de. For operational mail incidents, postmaster@km0digital.com.

security.metaTitle: Security and responsible disclosure - Kilometer 0 Digital
security.metaDescription: Security practices, ISO 27001 scope, and responsible vulnerability disclosure for km0digital.com, KM0 Cloud, and KM0 Mail.
security.heading: Security and responsible disclosure
security.intro: How we protect km0digital.com, KM0 Cloud, KM0 Mail, and related infrastructure, and how to report security vulnerabilities in good faith.

sections.title: Security practices
sections.bodyHtml:
KM0 Digital is operated by AMVARA CONSULTING S.L. We apply practices appropriate to a public marketing site and a self-hosted cloud platform:

  • Encryption: HTTPS/TLS for km0digital.com, cloud.km0digital.com, and mail.km0digital.com (Let's Encrypt certificates).
  • KM0 Mail: HTTPS on mail.km0digital.com; TLS for IMAPS (port 993) and authenticated SMTP submission (port 587); inbound SMTP on port 25; Rspamd anti-spam; DKIM signing and SPF/DMARC records; fail2ban for mail services.
  • HTTP security headers: including Strict-Transport-Security, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, and Permissions-Policy where configured.
  • EU infrastructure: hosting in Germany (Hetzner) with data processed primarily within the EU.
  • Access control: least privilege for operational access; multi-factor authentication for internal systems where applicable.
  • Development: protected main branch, code review, dependency monitoring, and documented operations in the technical blog.
  • Backups and monitoring: operational backups and logging for reliability and incident response.

We do not claim SOC 2, HIPAA, CCPA compliance, penetration-test programmes, or third-party audits unless explicitly verified and published.

For privacy-related information, see our legal and privacy page.

sections.title: ISO/IEC 27001:2022
sections.bodyHtml:
AMVARA CONSULTING S.L. is certified to ISO/IEC 27001:2022 by TÜV NORD CERT. KM0 Digital, cloud.km0digital.com, and mail.km0digital.com fall within AMVARA's certificate scope as part of its platform and associated services (cloud and mail).

KM0 Digital does not hold ISO 27001 certification under its own name. We design, deploy, and maintain KM0 under AMVARA's certified information security management system and follow those controls in our operations.

If you need the certificate, statement of applicability, or a security questionnaire, contact hello.yoel@amvara.de.

sections.title: Responsible vulnerability disclosure
sections.bodyHtml:
We welcome good-faith reports of security vulnerabilities affecting km0digital.com, cloud.km0digital.com, mail.km0digital.com, and related AMVARA-operated KM0 mail infrastructure.

Please do:

  • Report vulnerabilities promptly to hello.yoel@amvara.de.
  • Provide clear reproduction steps and impact assessment.
  • Avoid accessing, modifying, deleting, or exfiltrating data that is not yours.
  • Stop testing once a vulnerability is confirmed.
  • Allow reasonable time for remediation before public disclosure.

Please do not:

  • Conduct denial-of-service attacks.
  • Use social engineering, phishing, spam, or physical attacks.
  • Perform unauthorised data access or exfiltration.
  • Run intrusive automated scanning of production without prior written approval.
  • Attempt lateral movement, persistence, or public disclosure before we have had time to address the issue.

AMVARA will:

  • Acknowledge valid reports.
  • Investigate and communicate when appropriate.
  • Remediate based on severity and risk.
  • Not pursue legal action against researchers who follow this policy in good faith.

Security contact: hello.yoel@amvara.de. Machine-readable policy: /.well-known/security.txt.
